text: ELEVENTH: Neither this Subcontract nor any rights hereunder shall be assigned by the Subcontractor without the prior written consent of Contractor. Any attempt to assign the Subcontract or any rights hereunder shall, at the option of the Contractor, operate as an instant cause for termination of this Subcontract for default, and Subcontractor's rights hereunder and the rights of the parties shall be determined in the same manner as though the Subcontractor had at the time of such attempted assignment failed and refused to continue to perform the Subcontract.
